description: Create the modules-test-kesehatan.js file with the full Health Test module: admin views (tabs: Calon Karyawan, Karyawan Existing, Riwayat Test), test form, portal view, Firestore CRUD, and status indicators.
steps: Implement renderTestKesehatan() - admin page with tabs: 'Calon Karyawan' | 'Karyawan Existing' | 'Riwayat Test'. Each tab shows a table with status indicators (emoji badges). Include search/filter. Add button '+ Jadwalkan Test' to assign/request test.

Implement showTestKesehatanTab(tab) to switch between 'calon', 'existing', 'riwayat' tabs. 'calon' tab loads from hrd_test_kesehatan where tipe=='calon'. 'existing' tab loads where tipe=='existing'. 'riwayat' shows all completed tests.

Implement modalJadwalTestKesehatan(tipe) - form to schedule a test. For 'calon': dropdown of candidates from hrd_kandidat. For 'existing': dropdown of employees from hrd_karyawan (aktif). Fields: nama, tanggal, catatan. Creates a new doc in hrd_test_kesehatan with status 'pending'.

Implement modalFormTestKesehatan(id) - large modal form with all sections: (a) Data Umum (nama, usia, jenis kelamin, tinggi, berat, BMI auto-calc, golongan darah), (b) Riwayat Kesehatan (checkboxes for diseases, riwayat operasi, obat, rawat inap), (c) Pemeriksaan Fisik (tekanan darah systole/diastole, nadi, suhu, penglihatan kiri/kanan, pendengaran, gigi), (d) Pemeriksaan Lab optional (hemoglobin, gula darah, kolesterol, urine), (e) Kondisi Mental (gangguan mental ya/tidak, stres rendah/sedang/tinggi, kualitas tidur), (f) Kebiasaan (merokok ya/tidak + batang/hari, alkohol ya/tidak, olahraga ya/tidak + kali/minggu), (g) Kesimpulan (status: Sehat/Tidak Sehat/Perlu Pemeriksaan Lanjut, catatan dokter, rekomendasi, pemeriksa).

Implement simpanTestKesehatan(id) - saves form data to hrd_test_kesehatan. Updates status to 'selesai' if kesimpulan is filled. Sends notification to admin when employee submits. Uses BMI auto-calculation: weight/(height/100)^2.
Implement detailTestKesehatan(id) - read-only detail view modal showing all sections with formatted data and status badge.

Implement renderPortalTestKesehatan() - employee portal view. Shows: (1) upcoming scheduled tests, (2) history table of past results with status badges, (3) button to fill form if test is scheduled (status=='pending'). Pattern follows renderPortalDisc() in modules-portal.js.
Implement hapusTestKesehatan(id) - delete with confirmation. Admin only.
Add status indicator helpers: getStatusBadgeKesehatan(status) returns badge HTML with emoji (green circle Sehat, red circle Tidak Sehat, yellow circle Perlu Pemeriksaan Lanjut, hourglass Pending).
acceptance_criteria: renderTestKesehatan() renders admin page with 3 tabs and data tables
modalFormTestKesehatan() renders complete health form with all 7 sections
BMI auto-calculates from tinggi and berat inputs
renderPortalTestKesehatan() renders employee portal view with history and scheduled tests
Status badges show correct emoji indicators
Notifications sent to admin when test submitted
UI text is all in Indonesian
verification: Run 'wc -c modules-test-kesehatan.js' to confirm file is under 100KB (102400 bytes)

Run 'npx eslint modules-test-kesehatan.js --no-eslintrc --env browser,es2021 --parser-options=ecmaVersion:latest --rule "{semi: [error, always], quotes: [error, single, {avoidEscape: true}]}"' to check basic syntax
Grep for renderTestKesehatan, renderPortalTestKesehatan, modalFormTestKesehatan functions exist
